content: Backend: Create invoice_edit_requests & invoice_change_history collections schema in server.py
Backend: PUT /api/invoice-edit-requests/{id}/approve endpoint (approve + auto-update invoice + insert history)
Frontend: Create ApprovalModule.jsx (list, detail, approve/reject UI)
Frontend: Update ManualInvoiceModule.jsx (add Request Edit button + history tab)
Frontend: Add Approval module to App.js routing + Sidebar with badge polling
Testing: Run testing_agent_v3 for comprehensive end-to-end approval flow verification
Fix bugs reported by testing agent (if any)
